title: SWFOC Verified Facts Ledger
description: Structured, tool-attested ledger of claims about the SWFOC (Alamo engine) binary. Every entry records the claim, category, confidence level, the set of independent tools that corroborate it, and a per-tool evidence block. Lua-only corroboration is insufficient for VERIFIED status -- at least two distinct tools must agree.

claim.description: Human-readable description of the fact being asserted.

tools_consensus.description: List of distinct tools that independently corroborate the claim. At least 2 tools (non-Lua-only) are required to justify VERIFIED.

tool_findings.description: Per-tool evidence bag. Keys should match values in tools_consensus.

evidence_ref.description: File path, test ID, or decompiler session reference where this evidence can be reviewed.

decompile_hash.description: Optional hash of the decompiler output for drift detection.

first_documented.description: The date the claim was first recorded in any SWFOC document.

last_verified.description: The date the claim was most recently checked against a live tool.

engine_build_hash.description: Optional hash or version string identifying the StarWarsG.exe build this claim was verified against.

rva.description: RVA relative to image base 0x140000000 (Ghidra convention). Only applicable to code/data entries.

supersedes.description: ID of an earlier entry that this entry replaces. Used when a correction lands (e.g., mislabeled RVA).
